artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA interface showing Generator No. 1 faceplate with active alarms for underfrequency and motor faults.
artifact_blurb: A SCADA system screenshot displaying the operational faceplate for Generator No. 1, featuring a navigation toolbar and an active alarm panel indicating critical faults such as 'Underfrequency Alm' and 'Alarm Tab Motor Fault (On)'.
